response.justification: Despite a strong background in full-stack and distributed systems, the candidate has no demonstrable C++ experience in the last 9+ years, lacks exposure to industrial automation, IoT protocols, IEC 62443, or message brokers like MQTT in recent roles, and has been in a career gap since late 2025 — making it highly unlikely they can meet the core requirements of a senior C++ architect role in industrial automation.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with diverse technologies and architectures
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills
Proven ability to lead and mentor through workshops and community projects
concerns: No recent C++ work; last C++ role was in 2015
No experience with industrial standards (IEC 62443, Modbus, OPC UA, etc.)
Career gap since October 2025 and no evidence of C++ maintenance or upskilling
